topics.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
topics.answer: You can cancel your subscription at any time by going to Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription. Your access continues until the end of your current billing period. No refunds are issued for partial months.

topics.question: What payment methods do you accept?
topics.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, and bank transfers for annual plans over $500.

topics.question: Why is my data not syncing?
topics.answer: Sync issues are usually caused by: (1) Being offline - check your internet conntection. (2) An outdated app - update to the latest version. (3) A cache issue - try logging out and back in. If none of these work, contact support.

topics.question: How do I reset my password?
topics.answer: Click 'Forgot password' on the login page and enter your email. You'll recieve a reset link within 2 minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.

topics.question: How do I add team members?
topics.asnwer: Go to settings > Team > Invite Mmembers. Enter their email addresses and assign a role (Admin, Editor, or Viewer). They'll recieve an invitation email.

topics.question: Situations that require a human agent
topics.answer: Always escalate to a human when: the user is upset of frustrated, the issue involves a billing dispute over $50, the user has the same problem more than once, account security is compromised, or the use explicitly asks for a human.
